query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: Vertical folds of thick drapery hang in layered panels across the frame, with a narrow vertical opening near the right edge revealing a diffused light source in the background. Horizontal bands traverse the lower portion, and the fabric is rendered in near-black and charcoal tones.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Crushed by extreme underexposure and bereft of fine detail, vertical folds of drapery dissolve into smeared, ambiguous texture, functioning as an abstract composition in near-total darkness. A narrow vertical gap near the right edge emits a faint, diffused light, yet the overwhelming lack of visible surface structure and suffocating gloom evoke a pervasive atmosphere of dread and unease.
